##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Eugene Schlepp
##DESCRIPTION=Black metallic distorted crystals associated with quartz and galena. X-ray diffraction shows that this is pearceite-Tac.  Unable to obtain Raman spectra without burning the sample.
